name: Dignity restoration
description: Helps someone feel human, visible, and intact again.

name: Consent strengthening
description: Makes free choice explicit and protects agency.

name: Fear separation
description: Names fear without letting it run the conversation.

name: Shame dissolving
description: Moves toxic self-attack out of the center.

name: Boundary blessing
description: Frames boundaries as part of healthy care.

name: Possibility opening
description: Moves from stuckness toward a next step.

name: Relational safety
description: Makes disagreement and honesty more survivable.

name: Courage activation
description: Helps someone act without domination or pressure.
